instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: Our music homework
task.initialEmail: Hi,||We have to prepare a short talk about a famous musician for homework. [1]Do you think we should choose Ed Sheeran?[/1]||[2]Can we work on it after school today?[/2] I don’t want to leave it until the weekend.||[3]Where can we find good information?[/3]||[4]Would you like to present the first part?[/4]||Let me know||Owen

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Owen,||Thanks for your message. [1]I don’t think we should choose Ed Sheeran, but maybe we could choose Adele because her life and music are very interesting.[/1]||[2]I’m sorry, but I can’t work on it after school today because I have basketball practice. Could we meet tomorrow?[/2]||[3]We can find good information on the library computers and on music websites. We should also watch an interview.[/3]||[4]Yes, I’d be happy to present the first part because I don’t mind speaking first.[/4]||See you soon,||Liam
